body.why: The skip list matched directory NAMES while its docstring promised it skipped venv/site dirs. This repo's gitignored venv is test_env/ (2173 .py files), so every DickSimnel orientation ranked pip's vendored typing_extensions above the task's own files — misdirecting the weak model the map exists to keep from read-wandering.
